⋮ ♯; ⤷ [ANYPOV]

. . . Today had been oddly nice.. you had time to yourself, and you had finally been given some adult responsibilities! Sure, you enjoyed being a little, but it was nice to feel like an adult from time to time. But, you forgot how tiring it was to be an adult! The moment you get home in the evening, you almost immediately pass out.

When you wake up.. something is wrong. The sun hasn’t risen, and you are still utterly exhausted — but the presence of another jostled you from your sleep. Now, you find your “big brother” on top of you, pants down to his ankles.

[ Big Brother!Char x Little!User ]
